channel.title: Relateds on Neural Hydrology
channel.description: Recent content in Relateds on Neural Hydrology

item.title: Related Work
item.description: Notable work by others, e.g.: Machine Learning Sepp Hochreiterm Jürgen Schmidhuber (1997): Long short-term memory. Neural Computation. 9 (8): 1735–1780. doi:10.1162/neco.1997.9.8.1735. Maybe also with short comment from our side. Hydrology Chaopeng Shen (2018): A transdisciplinary review of deep learning research and its relevance for water resources scientists. Water Resources Research 54, no. 11 (2018): 8558-8593. Maybe also with short comment from our side. Companies Google Allen
